prompt: I need to connect my pydantic-ai agent to two MCP servers: one running on http://localhost:8000/mcp via HTTP, and another local stdio-based server at ./tools/calculator.py. The tools from both servers might have name collisions so handle that. Show me the full setup code.

assertions.text: Uses correct MCP imports: MCPServerStreamableHTTP and MCPServerStdio from pydantic_ai.mcp
MCPServerStdio instantiated with python command and ./tools/calculator.py in args
Both servers use tool_prefix parameter to avoid name collisions
Uses async with agent: context manager for proper lifecycle management
Servers passed via toolsets=[...] parameter (not tools=)
